1.name: Burkland Associates
1.verdict: There is very little public commentary on Burkland Associates. The firm is mentioned in two Reddit threads as a fractional CFO option, with one user specifically asking about their experience with R&D tax credits for software companies. No direct customer testimonials, positive or negative, were found in the provided data.

5.name: Zeni
5.verdict: There is very little public signal about Zeni in this data, with no direct customer reviews found. The firm is mentioned twice in Reddit threads on r/SaaS and r/startups as an example of an AI-powered accounting platform for small businesses. In these discussions, it is consistently listed alongside competitors like Digits and Docyt.
